pre_game.message: Hey, I’m D. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What’s your name?
Nice to meet you, D. I'm F. It definitely feels a bit heavy in here, everyone's eyeing the prize.
I hear you. It's hard not to be focused on the prize when you've got people counting on you back home. What brings you here, F?
Pretty much the same reason. I’ve got family counting on me, and I’m determined to bring home enough to make a real difference for them.
I respect that. It’s a lot of pressure, but it definitely keeps you focused. What kind of difference would this win make for them?
It’d mean everything—paying off some old debts and finally giving my parents a chance to actually relax for once.
I totally get that. Seeing your parents finally catch a break would be huge; I'm fighting for something similar for my family too.
It’s good to meet someone who gets it. Knowing what's at stake makes it easier to stay focused, doesn't it?
Absolutely. It makes the game about more than just ourselves when we're playing for the people we love.
Exactly. It's what keeps me going. Good luck to you and your family, D. I'm going to go clear my head before things start.
Thanks, F. Best of luck to you too, let's both do right by our families.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all stuck to the fair share of $10,000. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
Great coordination! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share and reached the best possible outcome.
Absolutely, it was a pleasure. I'm glad we reached this agreement together.
